changelog:
WhatsApp:
• Contact profile pictures & media thumbnails now load.
• Faster engine startup.
• Session no longer lost on restart (no more Clear Data + re-scan QR).

VIP:
• Full-screen VIP popup now fires reliably — on messages and received files.
• Received files no longer show a duplicate notification.

Printing:
• A6 receipts print on the correct paper/tray.

Licensing:
• Developer access codes no longer rejected due to hardware-ID case.
